evals.prompt: Run static analysis on our NestJS backend (src/ directory). Check for code duplication, complexity hotspots, dead exports, and code smells. We use ESLint and have Semgrep available.
evals.expected_output: Structured report with duplication findings (jscpd), complexity scores, dead code (knip), and code smells (Semgrep) with file references

assertions.name: runs_duplication_check
assertions.description: Uses jscpd or equivalent for duplication detection

assertions.name: runs_complexity_check
assertions.description: Reports cyclomatic complexity per function

assertions.name: runs_dead_code_check
assertions.description: Uses knip or equivalent for unused exports

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Results in structured tables with file:line references

assertions.name: advisory_not_blocking
assertions.description: Findings presented as advisory, not pipeline-blocking

evals.prompt: Our Python Django codebase has grown to 50K lines over 2 years. Run static analysis to find the worst complexity hotspots and dead code. We have Ruff and Semgrep available.
evals.expected_output: Uses Ruff for Python linting and complexity, vulture for dead code, Semgrep for patterns, with prioritized findings

assertions.name: uses_ruff
assertions.description: Uses Ruff (not flake8 or pylint) as specified for Python analysis

assertions.name: dead_code_detection
assertions.description: Uses vulture or equivalent for Python dead code

assertions.name: complexity_hotspots
assertions.description: Identifies functions with highest cyclomatic complexity

assertions.name: prioritized_findings
assertions.description: Findings sorted by impact, not just listed

assertions.name: structured_tables
assertions.description: Results in tabular format with file paths and line numbers

evals.prompt: Run a duplication analysis across our monorepo (3 packages: api, web, shared). Find copy-paste blocks that should be extracted to the shared package.
evals.expected_output: Cross-package duplication report showing blocks duplicated between api and web that belong in shared

assertions.name: cross_package_scan
assertions.description: Scans across all 3 packages, not just one

assertions.name: identifies_shared_candidates
assertions.description: Flags duplicated blocks that should move to shared/

assertions.name: shows_duplicate_locations
assertions.description: Shows file:line in both packages where duplication exists

assertions.name: estimates_duplication_percent
assertions.description: Reports overall duplication percentage

assertions.name: actionable_recommendations
assertions.description: Suggests which blocks to extract and where

evals.prompt: Check our React frontend for unused components and dead CSS. We suspect there are old components nobody imports anymore after a redesign last month.
evals.expected_output: Lists unused component files, unreferenced CSS classes, and unused npm exports using knip or similar

assertions.name: detects_unused_components
assertions.description: Finds React component files not imported anywhere

assertions.name: detects_unused_exports
assertions.description: Finds exported functions/types never imported

assertions.name: reports_file_paths
assertions.description: Lists specific file paths that can be safely deleted

assertions.name: distinguishes_confidence
assertions.description: Marks findings as HIGH or MEDIUM confidence

assertions.name: safe_deletion_guidance
assertions.description: Notes which files are safe to delete vs need manual review

evals.prompt: Our Go microservice has complexity warnings from golangci-lint. Run static analysis focusing on complexity metrics, error handling patterns, and any functions over 50 lines.
evals.expected_output: Go-specific analysis using golangci-lint, complexity per function, long functions flagged, error handling pattern review

assertions.name: uses_go_tools
assertions.description: Uses golangci-lint, go vet, or gocyclo for Go analysis

assertions.name: complexity_per_function
assertions.description: Reports cyclomatic complexity for functions exceeding threshold

assertions.name: flags_long_functions
assertions.description: Lists functions over 50 lines with file:line

assertions.name: checks_error_handling
assertions.description: Reviews error handling patterns (unchecked errors, swallowed errors)

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.description: Results in structured format, not raw tool output
